pollingIntervalSeconds.title: Polling Interval
pollingIntervalSeconds.description: How often to poll Roborock state and push updates to Matter.

username.title: Roborock Account Email
username.description: Roborock account email. When set with Password, the plugin discovers vacuums from the Roborock cloud.

password.title: Roborock Account Password
password.description: Roborock account password. Stored by Homebridge like other plugin config secrets.

verificationCode.title: Email Verification Code
verificationCode.description: Optional one-time Roborock email verification code. Add it only if logs say verification is required, restart Homebridge, then remove it after login succeeds.
